name: conversation mode — proposal request ('اقترح عليا') returns actual proposal, state stays DISCUSSION, pipeline not entered (PHASE-16.1 core outcome guard)
description: RED (before D2 gate): 'اقترح عليا' enters pipeline → mode = IDEATION_IN_PROGRESS, state → IDEATION → FAIL. GREEN (after D2 gate): conversation gate fires → monkey-patched provider returns proposal → mode = CONVERSATION_RESPONSE, message includes 'مقترح', state stays DISCUSSION → PASS. This is the scenario that directly tests the G1 fix outcome.
